name: leafwriter
description: xml editing and rdf annotation using github as document store
author: Luciano Frizzera <lucaju@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @cwrc/leafwriter-storage-service & npm run dev -w leafwriter-commons
scripts.dev-worker: npm run dev -w @cwrc/leafwriter-storage-service & npm run dev-worker -w leafwriter-commons
scripts.build-commons: npm run build -w @cwrc/leafwriter-storage-service && npm run build -w leafwriter-commons
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run dev -w leafwriter-commons & npm run dev -w crcao-desktop
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build-commons && npm run build -w crcao-desktop && npm run package -w crcao-desktop
